hook.name: WETH Hook
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook that enables seamless ETH/WETH wrapping and unwrapping within v4 pools at a 1:1 ratio. It intercepts swaps to deposit or withdraw ETH from the WETH contract in-flight, supporting both exact input and exact output swaps, while blocking liquidity operations since the pool serves purely as a conversion mechanism.
